title: Capstone: Ship the Multi-Agent System
concept: A final worked capstone combining every phase pillar into one deployable system. 'Phase H: AI Agents & Agentic AI is complete. You have mastered the entire AI Agents & Agentic AI curriculum!'.

exercises.prompt: What is a key benefit of using Agentic Architecture in AI systems?

options.text: It reduces the need for memory.
It allows models to improve seamlessly over time.
It limits the use of multiple agents.

exercises.explain: Agentic Architecture allows the system to seamlessly adapt and improve, making it a powerful tool in AI development.

cards.title: Welcome to Your Capstone!
cards.body: In this lesson, you'll integrate everything you've learned about AI agents into one amazing multi-agent system.

cards.title: Multi-Agent System
cards.body: A multi-agent system is a group of agents that work together to accomplish complex tasks, sharing information and resources.

cards.title: Like a Team of Superheroes!
cards.body: Imagine a group of superheroes each with unique powers. Together, they can tackle bigger challenges than they can alone. That's how multi-agent systems work!

cards.title: Real-World Example
cards.body: Think of an AI helping a smart city. Different agents manage traffic, energy, and security, all coordinating to make the city operate smoothly.

cards.title: Myth: Agents Work Alone
cards.body: Some believe individual agents can solve all problems by themselves. In reality, collaboration between agents often leads to better outcomes.

cards.title: Collaboration in Action
cards.body: How agents cooperate in a multi-agent system vs. working alone.

left.text: An agent works solo on a simple task.

right.text: Multiple agents share tasks and resources to solve complex issues.

exercises.prompt: What is crucial when deploying a multi-agent system?

options.text: Every agent should have the same function.
Agents must effectively communicate and collaborate.
Only one agent should manage the entire system.
The system should avoid using any memory.

exercises.explain: Effective communication and collaboration among agents is essential for a multi-agent system to succeed.

exercises.prompt: A multi-agent system can be as simple as one agent working alone.
exercises.explain: False. A multi-agent system involves multiple agents working together, not just one.

exercises.prompt: In a multi-agent system, agents work __________ to achieve more complex tasks.
exercises.sentence: In a multi-agent system, agents work together to achieve more complex tasks.
exercises.explain: Together means they collaborate and share resources, enhancing their capabilities.

exercises.prompt: Which of the following best describes the purpose of a multi-agent system?

options.text: To have agents perform tasks independently without any coordination.
To ensure all agents do the same task repeatedly.
To have agents collaborate and share information to solve complex problems.

exercises.explain: Correct! Multi-agent systems thrive on collaboration, allowing agents to tackle challenges that a single agent could not manage alone.

exercises.prompt: What is the main advantage of utilizing a multi-agent architecture in your system design?

options.text: It focuses on individual performance over collaboration.
It allows agents to combine their strengths for diverse problem-solving.
It limits the scalability of your system.
It makes the programming process more complicated without benefit.

exercises.explain: The correct answer is that multi-agent architecture allows agents to combine their strengths. This enhances the system's ability to solve various problems collaboratively, leveraging each agent's unique skills. Phase H: AI Agents & Agentic AI is complete. You have mastered the entire AI Agents & Agentic AI curriculum!
